<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-1162" location="lines:1162-1164" -->
```bash
   # 4. Get the party ID for that user
   APP_USER_PARTY=$(curl -s "http://localhost:2975/v2/users/$APP_USER_ID" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $USER_ADMIN_TOKEN" | jq -r '.user.primaryParty')
```
